refusal_at_audit: Phase 1 (PassiveWitnessCollector trait) REFUSED as a standalone slice: it collides with the freshly-ratified fence in a43afa5 (the bool-wall already exists structurally at the Collectors roster; heterogeneous payloads make a trait contract-naming, not a guarantee). what_executed.module_added: crates/nq-monitor/src/tls_cert_probe.rs (new) — the active-witness lane's first specimen, receipt-only, registered in lib.rs only (NOT main.rs: the binary has no transport yet, so no dead-code in the bin).
what_executed.receipt_type: TlsCertProbeReceipt (schema nq.probe.tls_cert.v1) + supporting types: TlsCertFacts (delivery basis + response_horizon + presented_chain + chain validation), TlsCertPolicy, TlsCertTarget, ClockBasis, Perturbation. Concrete, NOT a generic ProbeReceipt<T> (generalization deferred until a 2nd/3rd probe pressures the columns, per WITNESS_SURFACE).
what_executed.verdict_evaluator: evaluate_tls_cert(target, facts, policy, clock, now) -> TlsCertProbeReceipt — PURE, clock-injected. Verdict precedence: dns/tcp/tls delivery -> no_certificate_presented -> chain_invalid -> name_mismatch -> expired_under_probe_clock -> valid_but_within_warning_horizon -> valid_at_probe_time. `now` drives days_remaining AND the expiry check; verdict is expired_under_probe_clock, NEVER expired_absolutely.
what_executed.verdict_ladder: TlsCertVerdict enum — reality-derived from ACTIVE_WITNESS_TLS_PROBE_CANDIDATE.md, explicitly NOT final; renewed_since_prior_probe deferred (needs prior-probe state).
what_executed.tests: 13 fixture unit tests, grounded in the REAL nq.neutral.zone step-0 cert (LE YE2, notAfter 2026-08-29): valid_at_probe_time (days_remaining=71), within_warning_horizon, expired_under_probe_clock, injected_clock_drives_the_verdict (same facts + different now => different verdict; identical now => byte-identical receipt), name_mismatch, wildcard_san_covers_one_label, chain_invalid, dns/tcp/tls_handshake delivery negatives, no_certificate_presented (the step-0 false-green: handshake-but-no-cert is a NEGATIVE, never a pass), receipt_serializes_with_typed_verdict_and_no_bool_coercion, pinned_ca_adds_operator_universe_non_claim.

lane_separation: Active-witness lane: emits a receipt only. Does NOT write the passive collector's evidence tables (unlike the DNS probe, which writes dns_observations). Does NOT coerce to operational/green status — output is a typed TlsCertVerdict; a test asserts no is_ok/healthy/green appears in the serialized surface.
